##LOCALITY=Foote mine, North Carolina, USA
##OWNER=Natural History Museum of Los Angeles County
##SOURCE=Tony Kampf
##DESCRIPTION=Colorless to light brown, slightly flattened prisms with wedge-shaped terminations formed by late-stage, low-temperature hydrothermal alteration. Type sample, described by Kampf et al 2021
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R250072
